news.t: WisdomTree Celebrates 10th Anniversary of the Yield Enhanced US Aggregate Bond Fund (AGGY)

overview.description: The WisdomTree Yield Enhanced U.S. Aggregate Bond Fund (AGGY) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund tracks an index of USD-denominated investment-grade securities, divided into 20 subcomponents. Subcomponents are reweighted to achieve higher yield-to-worst. AGGY was launched on Jul 9, 2015 and is issued by WisdomTree.

data.title: WisdomTree Celebrates 10th Anniversary of the Yield Enhanced US Aggregate Bond Fund (AGGY)
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--WisdomTree today celebrates the 10th anniversary of the launch of the Yield Enhanced US Aggregate Bond Fund (AGGY).
